preview.empty: Nothing on the calendar today — add an event and your honest day shows up here.

capacityNote.accessibilityLabel: This is a full day. Trimming one block buys back the most time.
capacityNote.text: That's a full day. Trim one block and the rest has room to breathe.

screen.title: Pad my calendar
screen.subtitle: Your real buffers, mapped onto today. Nothing changes until you tap apply.
screen.denied: Whenbee needs calendar access to pad your calendar. You can turn it on in Settings whenever you're ready.
screen.empty: Today's calendar is clear. Add a few events and come back — the padding will be waiting.

notPro.title: Padding your calendar is a Pro feature
